zh.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst於1478年6月26日出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德洛斯賀波利。他於大約1503年與Susan Rowland在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年2月19日在他的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst于1478年6月26日出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德洛斯賀波利。他于大约1503年与Susan Rowland在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年2月19日在他的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Taylor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: occupational name for a tailor, from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English taillour ‘tailor’ (Old French tailleor, tailleur; Late Latin taliator, from taliare ‘to cut’). The surname is extremely common in Britain and Ireland. In North America, it has absorbed equivalents from other languages, many of which are also common among Ashkenazic Jews, for example German Schneider and Hungarian Szabo . It is also very common among African Americans.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Terrien   ‘owner of a farmland’ or of its altered forms, such as   Therrien   and   Terrian  .

variants.name: Tayloe
meanings: Altered form of English, Scottish, and Irish   Taylor  .

variants.name: Schneider
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Franz, Erwin, Fritz, Dieter, Manfred, Heinz, Alois, Ewald, Helmut.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, literally ‘cutter’, from Middle High German snīder, German Schneider, Yiddish shnayder. The same term was sometimes used to denote a woodcutter. This surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Hungary, Poland, and Czechia. In Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is also established in Slavicized forms (see 2 below). In part, Schneider is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare Sneider 1, Snider 1, and Snyder 1.
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Šnajdr or Šnajder, and Czech Šneidr, Šneider, Šnejdr, and Šnejder, surnames of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Tailor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Pravin, Dilip, Mahesh, Sanjay, Kanchan, Kaushik, Manilal, Mohanlal, Navnit, Shailesh, Ajay, Alpana.
Indian (Gujarat and Mumbai): mainly Parsi occupational name from the English word tailor.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst was born on 26 June 1478, in Rothbury, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. He married Susan Rowland about 1503, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 February 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst est né le 26 juin 1478, à Rothbury, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Susan Rowland environ 1503, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 février 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst wurde am 26. Juni 1478 in Rothbury, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1503 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Susan Rowland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Februar 1555 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst è nato il il 26 giugno 1478 nel Rothbury, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurstは1478年6月26日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドロスブリーで生まれた。約1503年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでSusan Rowlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年2月19日に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst(은)는 1478년 6월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 로스버이에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Susan Rowland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 2월 19일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Susan Rowland aproximadamente 1503, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: John H Taylor of Shadoxhurst родился 26 июня 1478 г. в местности ротбури, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Susan Rowland около 1503 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 февраля 1555 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.
